GenAiFunction.description:
Answer questions from the company's internal knowledge base — uploaded documents, PDFs, policies, contracts, and other unstructured files indexed in a Data Cloud data library. Returns an AI-generated answer with inline file-name citations.
Use when: - The question is about document content: "What does our sales policy say about discounts?", "Find the termination clause in the uploaded contract.", "What's in the onboarding handbook?". - The user refers to "the policy", "the contract", "the handbook", "our documents", "internal docs".
NOT for: - Structured records, counts, aggregates, lists of records — use QueryDataCloud (Data Cloud entities) or QueryRecordsWithSoql (SObjects). Example NOT fit: "How many accounts in tier Gold?", "List opportunities closing this quarter." - A file the user just attached in this conversation — use AnswerWithCurrentFile. - Public web content — use SearchWeb.
Input: - chunkDmo: API name of the chunk entity (ends in _chunk__dlm). Discover via ExploreDataCloud (scope=summary) first — never guess. - question: reformulate the user's message into a self-contained, contextually complete question. Include relevant background from the conversation. Do NOT simply forward the user's last utterance.
